steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best defines 'high-sinuosity river.' A definition must state the essential meaning of the term — not how it forms, behaves, or an example of one.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'many meanders, or U-shaped curves': states the essential meaning of the term directly. ✓
  • Choice B — details about meander behavior: describes what meanders do, not what a high-sinuosity river is. ✗
  • Choice C — explains formation: tells how the river forms, not its definition. ✗
  • Choice D — a specific example: illustrates the term with an instance rather than defining it. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
